```{r}
library(MASS)

# Load your RData file
load("/Users/yangjinzhe/Desktop/doctorvisits.rda")

# Suppose your object is called 'df' (data.frame)
write.csv(doctorvisits, "doctorvisits.csv", row.names = FALSE)

head(doctorvisits)
model <- glm(numvisit ~ reform + badh + age + educ + loginc, family = poisson, doctorvisits)

model_nb <- glm.nb(numvisit ~ reform + badh + age + educ + loginc, doctorvisits)

# model result for poisson regression
model
p_res <- residuals(model, type = "pearson")
sum(abs(p_res) > 3)

# model result for negtive binomial regression
model_nb
p_res <- residuals(model_nb, type = "pearson")
sum(abs(p_res) > 3)

theta = 0.9978731512246424
mu = 3.742388660271744
dnbinom(0, size = theta, mu = mu  )
```
